titleStmt.title: SII 34.259: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 259. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Gift of taxes on some land to the temple of Tiruvaraṅguḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār by the ūrār of Peruṅgaraikkuḍi alias Tiruvaraṅguḷanallūr in Kāṉa-nāḍu. The land came to the possession of the ūrār by purchase and mortgage from the maṟava araiyakaḷ of Peruṅguḍi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulaicEkaratEvaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu kāṉa ṉāṭṭup peruṅ
karaik kuṭiyāṉa tiruvaraṉkuḷa nallūr Ūrāyicainta Ūrōm nāṅkaḷ peruṅkuṭi maṟava
raiyakaḷ pakkal vilaiyum Oṟṟiyuṅkoṇṭuṭaiya peruṅkaraikkuṭi vayalu nelvāy
vayalilum cōlaiēri vayalum nīrnila puṉṟai puḷi kaṭamai kaṭaiyakkuṭi Āḷaṭaiya
nāyaṉāṟku Iṟuttapaṭiyilēy Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku canti
rātittavaṟ Iṟai Iṟuppōmāka cempiluñ cilaiyilu veṭṭik kuṭuttōm peruṅ
karaikkuṭiyāṉa tiruvaraṉkuḷanallūr Ūrāy Icainta Ūrōm ..
Digital edition of SII 34.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
